summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR candidates. No merge can be recommended because none has a complete merge preflight with clean checks, mergeability, completed ClawSweeper/Codex review, and resolved review evidence. The usage PR has a useful but not safely executable repair path from the provided artifacts because the planned fix action lacks a complete fix artifact. The NO_PROXY PR is quarantined for central security handling per validator classification. One draft PR should stay out of finalization until proof/ready state changes; the two Telegram HTML PRs need maintainer selection because their scopes overlap but are not identical.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with a plausible repair/review path, but failing check-dependencies, unknown mergeability, missing completed review preflight, and no complete executable fix_artifact block a planned fix action.
Draft PR with failed proof is not ready for merge or replacement planning; keep it independent until the author marks it ready and proof/validation exists.
Maintainer judgment is needed to choose or combine the overlapping Telegram HTML fixes because #93984 and #93988 are related but not identical, and both lack proof.
Route exact PR #93840 to central OpenClaw security handling per deterministic validator security-sensitive classification.
